시편 38:1.content: Yahweh, don’t rebuke me in your wrath, neither chasten me in your hot displeasure.

시편 38:2.content: For your arrows have pierced me, your hand presses hard on me.

시편 38:3.content: There is no soundness in my flesh because of your indignation, neither is there any health in my bones because of my sin.

시편 38:4.content: For my iniquities have gone over my head. As a heavy burden, they are too heavy for me.

시편 38:5.content: My wounds are loathsome and corrupt because of my foolishness.

시편 38:6.content: I am in pain and bowed down greatly. I go mourning all day long.

시편 38:7.content: For my waist is filled with burning. There is no soundness in my flesh.

시편 38:8.content: I am faint and severely bruised. I have groaned by reason of the anguish of my heart.

시편 38:9.content: Lord, all my desire is before you. My groaning is not hidden from you.

시편 38:10.content: My heart throbs. My strength fails me. As for the light of my eyes, it has also left me.

시편 38:11.content: My lovers and my friends stand aloof from my plague. My kinsmen stand far away.

시편 38:12.content: They also who seek after my life lay snares. Those who seek my hurt speak mischievous things, and meditate deceits all day long.

시편 38:13.content: But I, as a deaf man, don’t hear. I am as a mute man who doesn’t open his mouth.

시편 38:14.content: Yes, I am as a man who doesn’t hear, in whose mouth are no reproofs.

시편 38:15.content: For I hope in you, Yahweh. You will answer, Lord my God.

시편 38:16.content: For I said, “Don’t let them gloat over me, or exalt themselves over me when my foot slips.”

시편 38:17.content: For I am ready to fall. My pain is continually before me.

시편 38:18.content: For I will declare my iniquity. I will be sorry for my sin.

시편 38:19.content: But my enemies are vigorous and many. Those who hate me without reason are numerous.

시편 38:20.content: They who render evil for good are also adversaries to me, because I follow what is good.

시편 38:21.content: Don’t forsake me, Yahweh. My God, don’t be far from me.

시편 38:22.content: Hurry to help me, Lord, my salvation.
